title: fagraea ridleyi
intro: Fagraea ridleyi, also known as the Bornean frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Fagraea ridleyi can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, allowing for various applications in treating different health conditions.
